commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The words of king Lemuel, the prophecy that his mother taught him. This name signifies, God with him; and is supposed to be one of the names of Solomon. (Challoner) Grotius would explain it of Ezechias. But why should we abandon the tradition of both Jews and Christians. Mother; Bethsabee, who it seems was inspired, unless she received these maxims from Nathan. Solomon always speaks of her with the utmost respect, as a prudent mother may have the greatest influence over the tender minds of her children, chap. , and xxiii.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Lamuel: This name signifies God with him, and is supposed to have been one of the names of Solomon.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
